title: EQ - Dialog for "i" button is present and can be closed
scenario: EQ "i" icon in Device Settings displays informational dialog about EQ affecting music streaming only, dismissible by tapping anywhere
steps: Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Observe the "i" icon next to the EQ headline
Tap on the dialog or anywhere on the screen to dismiss it
expected: An informational "i" icon is present next to the EQ headline. Tapping it displays a dialog explaining that Equalizer (EQ) enhances clarity by adjusting frequency for your preferred sound signature, and that changes affect music streaming, not telephony. The dialog can be dismissed by tapping on it or anywhere on the screen.
